findings.title: Live git merge conflict markers left unresolved in ROADMAP.md footer
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md lines 308-314 contained live git merge conflict markers (<<<<<<< HEAD, =======, >>>>>>>) from the merge commit 66aa172 (2026-06-18). The merge PR left the footer conflict unresolved. Any parser, Decomposer, or agent reading ROADMAP.md encountered malformed content.
findings.fix_sketch: Remove conflict markers and keep the 2026-06-17 version footer.

findings.title: ROADMAP.md reconciliation note references 'ADR-0004' ambiguously — IFleet vs factory ADR-0004 collision
findings.detail: The ROADMAP.md reconciliation note cited 'M4.5 Phase C routing migration (ADR-0004)' referring to IFleet's routing ADR. In this factory repo, ADR-0004 means 'Build full pipeline before client #1' (pipeline-first strategy). An agent reading this note would look up the wrong ADR.
findings.fix_sketch: Qualify the cross-repo ADR reference as 'IFleet ADR-0004 — see IFleet docs/adr/0004-canonical-routing-alignment.md'.

findings.title: README.md reports spec-template 'Not yet created' but M-001 is marked shipped
findings.detail: README.md stated weautomatehq1/spec-template has status 'Not yet created' while ROADMAP.md has M-001 flipped to shipped with evidence the repo was created 2026-05-16. README was the human-facing entry point and gave a false picture of system state.
findings.fix_sketch: Update README.md table to 'Exists (created 2026-05-16, isTemplate: true, [M-001] shipped)'.

findings.title: STAKEHOLDERS.md decision log references superseded ADR-0006 instead of ADR-0011
findings.detail: STAKEHOLDERS.md decision log cited 'ADR-0006' for the Retell AI voice default decision. ADR-0006 is now status: superseded by ADR-0011. Agents checking the log would chain to a superseded decision document.

findings.title: STATUS.md last_updated is 2026-06-18 and overdue day counts are stale
findings.detail: STATUS.md footer said 'Last updated: 2026-06-18' when today is 2026-06-20. SPRINT-B overdue count said 28 days (now 30) and Retell R1 overdue said 29 days (now 31). Violates AGENTS.md §7 'Always update .omc/STATUS.md at end of every session.'
findings.fix_sketch: Update STATUS.md with today's date and corrected day counts.

findings.title: SPRINT-2026-05-B does not exist — active sprint missing for 30 days
findings.detail: Every coordination file references SPRINT-2026-05-B as the promised follow-up to SPRINT-2026-05-A. No such file exists. Without it there is no canonical active sprint, violating AGENTS.md §2 required reading order item 6 (SPRINT.md as work queue). Requires human decision to create with realistic scope.
findings.fix_sketch: Create SPRINT-2026-05-B.md (or SPRINT-2026-06-A.md) with realistic scope. Requires Sebastian/Esme input on scope.

findings.title: Retell R1 research 31 days overdue with 5 milestones blocked
findings.detail: ADR-0011 retains Retell pending Esme R1 confirmation. Q3 BLOCKING DECISION is now 31 days overdue. M-005, M-006, M-007, M-010, M-015 are all blocked. No deadline has been set.
findings.fix_sketch: Sebastian must confirm Retell or commission ADR-0012. Add hard deadline in STATUS.md.
